title: Tunisian Custard Tart
description: A traditional Tunisian dessert featuring a yeasty crust and intensely creamy custard filling, served in a tagliere vessel.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large mixing bowl, whisk together the flour, yeast, and sugar.
In a separate bowl, whisk together the eggs, milk, melted butter, vanilla extract, and salt.
Slowly pour the wet ingredients into the dry ingredients and whisk until a smooth batter forms.
Pour the batter into a tagliere vessel and bake for 25 minutes.
Reduce the oven temperature to 350 degrees Fahrenheit and continue baking for an additional 10 minutes.
Remove the tart from the oven and let it cool to room temperature.
Once the tart has cooled, refrigerate it for at least 2 hours to allow the custard to set.
Slice and serve the tart chilled.
